recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: The Mimic
recommendations.overview: The mother of a missing child takes in a lost girl she finds in the woods, but soon begins to wonder if she is even human.

recommendations.title: Theatre of Blood
recommendations.overview: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition.

recommendations.title: Painless
recommendations.overview: While searching for a solution to his serious health condition, David, a renowned neurosurgeon, discovers a sinister secret hidden in the past.

recommendations.title: Popcorn
recommendations.overview: While holding a horror film festival, a group of film students find themselves stalked by a madman who may have a sinister connection to a cult leader.

recommendations.title: Road Train
recommendations.overview: A supernatural thriller about a group of teenagers menaced by a driver-less train in the Australian outback.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension
recommendations.overview: Using a special camera that can see spirits, a family must protect their daughter from an evil entity with a sinister plan.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer
recommendations.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: Night Shift
recommendations.overview: A young woman working her first night shift at a remote motel begins to suspect that she is being followed by a dangerous character from her past. As the night progresses and increasingly supernatural  events occur, she quickly finds out that nothing

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.
